title: old DWCM stuff
description: readds some of the old blocks, a dalek (soon more) and dalekanium tools and armor
body:
**Thought the mod was going a bit too far away from what the original mod was, so I thought "why don't I make a addon for it?" and so here it is.**

adds:

some of the original DWCM blocks

a time war dalek

and dalek anium tools and armor (wip texture)
